title: SyncFlare
description: Plugin that connects Ngrok dynamic ip tunnel to the CloudFlare domain automatically
body:
## About
SyncFlare is a Minecraft server plugin that automates the integration of a dynamic IP tunnel from Ngrok with a Cloudflare domain. This plugin helps Minecraft server owners by updating the Cloudflare DNS records automatically whenever the Ngrok IP changes. It ensures seamless connectivity for players by always pointing the domain to the latest tunnel IP.

## Requirements
- [NGROK](https://ngrok.io/) Account **[REQUIRED]**
- [CloudFlare](https://cloudflare.com/) Account and Domain _[Optional]_
- Discord Webhook _[Optional]_


## Credits
Original Project: [Ixf1nity](https://github.com/Ixf1nity) & [tomasalias](https://github.com/tomasalias)
